reviews_data.review_text: Cutest little coffee shop! I had a lavender hazelnut latte that was super good! I travel a lot and I have a fav coffee shop everywhere I go! This is my new fav for Gastonia / BC. The owner is very kind and it’s cool to see a family owned coffee shop come to town instead of a chain. Try his teas & lemonades too!
Stopped by this afternoon for a vanilla + lavender iced coffee and a banana muffin. I was very happy with both. Services was excellent. Looking forward to returning.
Friendly, welcoming environment! Let's support our small businesses!
Great customer service! Very friendly and helpful. Good pricing! Great space to work while having your coffee.
Cute place. Great service and prices!
Great atmosphere, foot and coffee. Staff is nice and our order was ready pretty quick. Also, cheaper than chain coffee shops!
Fresh coffee, great service and convenient location.
Absolutely loved this little gem, the coffee is amazing and the conversation was even better! So nice, with a warm and cozy vibe.

I love Kuppajoe, the atmosphere and music is incredible! the vibe inside is comparable to a coffee shop on the beach. The coffee and pastry is delicious and authentic (i got their blueberry muffin). i highly recommend kuppajoe to anyone looking for a peaceful morning filled with delicious food and delightful service!
•jade

Just tried this place and it was great. Such a chill, positive atmosphere. The danish was lovely, and they offered to warm it up. The mocha latte is bigger than I get at other places for a better price. And it was delicious. And on top of it, they do loyalty cards. Seriously, go try this place.

The coffee is great and Joe's Tea is pretty good. I also got a raspberry danish, they went great with the Mocha I ordered. Dalavon was great with service as well as conversation. I highly recommend and will be back.

Friendly staff.

Explain things to you as you make your order.
Very happy to support new/local small businesses near by. Coffee is great and this lemonade is SO good! Service is fast and friendly. Noticed they have a rainbow bagel, will try that my next visit!
The staff were very friendly, the music and ambiance were nice and the coffee was great!!
Amazing drinks, and very kind staff ! I definitely recommend
Customer service was great! The caramel iced cappuccino and the dragon fruit juice were so good!
It's's great to have a coffee shop in our area .Nice cozy and comfortable great service And most of all the coffee is good!!!!!
